title: Executive Order 8730—Amendment of Subdivision IX, Schedule B, Civil Service Rules

flags.justification: A narrow, technical rule amendment creating a bounded promotion pathway.
Recommended by the Civil Service Commission with an explicit agreement from the Fourth Assistant Postmaster General regarding future appointment practices.
This defines a promotion-eligibility pathway, not an enforcement regime.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
A standing civil-service rule, evergreen by nature.

The order explicitly states the pathway 'will not accord to such employees a classified status or render them eligible to transfer to classified positions in other branches' — a deliberately narrow, self-limiting design preventing broader circumvention of the merit system.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A narrow, technical civil-service rule adjustment.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
A limited, explicitly bounded promotion exception for specific job categories, not a broad undermining carve-out.
